# \[FEATURE\] Add programmatic context recovery for noninteractive mode when single tool call exceeds context limit\#13831

[New issue](https://github.com/login?return_to=https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/13831)

Copy link

[New issue](https://github.com/login?return_to=https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/13831)

[\[FEATURE\] Add programmatic context recovery for noninteractive mode when single tool call exceeds context limit](https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/13831#top)#13831

Copy link

Labels

[area:core](https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues?q=state%3Aopen%20label%3A%22area%3Acore%22) [enhancementNew feature or request](https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues?q=state%3Aopen%20label%3A%22enhancement%22) New feature or request [memory](https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues?q=state%3Aopen%20label%3A%22memory%22)

[![@tadasant](https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/3900899?u=0b9ee4ad0ede3e67313c17f37878d6ac9be396eb&v=4&size=80)](https://github.com/tadasant)

## Description

[![@tadasant](https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/3900899?u=0b9ee4ad0ede3e67313c17f37878d6ac9be396eb&v=4&size=48)](https://github.com/tadasant)

[tadasant](https://github.com/tadasant)

opened [on Dec 12, 2025on Dec 12, 2025](https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/13831#issue-3724589628)

Issue body actions

## Problem

When running Claude Code in noninteractive mode (`--print` or via SDK), if a single tool call returns output that exceeds the context limit, the session becomes irrecoverable. There is no programmatic way to recover from this state.

### The specific failure mode:

1. A tool call (e.g., `mcp__ide__getDiagnostics`, `Bash` with verbose output, or `Update` on a large file) returns content that pushes context usage beyond 100%
2. `/compact` fails because the conversation is already too large to compact
3. In interactive mode, users can recover by pressing `Esc+Esc` (rewind) to go back to before the failed tool call
4. **In noninteractive mode, there is no equivalent mechanism** \- the session simply fails with no recovery path

### Real-world impact:

- Multi-agent orchestration workflows become fragile - a single unexpected large output can crash an entire automated pipeline
- Users running headless CI/CD integrations with Claude Code have no fallback
- The problem is exacerbated with MCP servers that may return unexpectedly large outputs

## Proposed Solutions

### Option 1: Add `--rewind-on-context-overflow` flag (Recommended)

```
claude --print --rewind-on-context-overflow "run diagnostics and fix errors"
```

When context limit is exceeded by a single tool call:

1. Automatically rewind to before the problematic tool call
2. Log a warning about what was truncated
3. Continue execution with a system note that the tool output was too large
4. Optionally retry with truncated output if tool supports it

### Option 2: Add SDK/CLI option to specify rewind point

```
# Resume from a specific message index, discarding everything after
claude --continue --rewind-to-message 5 --print "try a different approach"
```

This would allow orchestration systems to:

1. Catch the context overflow error
2. Inspect the conversation state
3. Programmatically rewind to a safe point
4. Continue with an alternative strategy

### Option 3: Pre-flight context budget per tool call

```
claude --print --max-tool-output-tokens 50000 "run build and fix errors"
```

Prevent the issue proactively by:

1. Setting a maximum token budget per tool call
2. Truncating/summarizing outputs that exceed the budget
3. Never allowing a single tool call to consume more than X% of remaining context

### Option 4: Export session state for external recovery

```
claude --print --export-session-on-error ./session-backup.json "complex task"
```

When an error occurs:

1. Export the full session state to a file
2. Include message indices and content
3. Allow external tools to manipulate and resume

## Related Issues

- [\[BUG\] Claude Code ingests massive tool outputs without truncation, causing context overflow #12054](https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/12054) \- Claude Code ingests massive tool outputs without truncation (closed as dup of [Claude Code stores all bash output in memory causing 90GB+ memory usage and crashes #11155](https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/11155))
- [\[BUG\] 'Update' tool on a large file loads the entire file into context exceeding the compactable amount causing the chat to become irrecoverable. #8047](https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/8047) \- Update tool on large file causes irrecoverable context
- [Context Truncation: Unable to Compact Conversation Due to Length Limit #3968](https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/3968) \- Context Truncation: Unable to Compact Conversation Due to Length Limit
- [\[FEATURE\] Add option to rewind conversation without creating a fork #9279](https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/9279) \- Add option to rewind conversation without creating a fork
- [\[BUG\]`API Error: Context limit exceeded makes tool unusable in longer sessions` #6559](https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/6559) \- Context limit exceeded makes tool unusable in longer sessions

## Environment

- **Use case**: Multi-agent orchestration with Claude Code in noninteractive mode
- **Affected modes**: `--print`, SDK programmatic usage, headless automation

## Additional Context

The interactive mode already has excellent recovery UX with `Esc+Esc` rewind. This feature request is specifically about exposing equivalent functionality for programmatic/automated use cases where interactive recovery is not possible.

This would make Claude Code significantly more robust for production automation workflows where unexpected large outputs are a reality.

## Activity

## Description

### Preflight Checklist

- I have searched [existing requests](https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues?q=is%3Aissue%20label%3Aenhancement) and this feature hasn't been requested yet































This is a single feature request (not multiple features)




















To pick up a draggable item, press the space bar.
While dragging, use the arrow keys to move the item.
Press space again to drop the item in its new position, or press escape to cancel.



### Problem Statement

I want to automate plugin installation for the engineers in my org via a bash script to allow us to sync on plugins via a repo.

### Proposed Solution

I would like to be able to install plugins directly via the command line like `claude --not-interactive /plugin install <plugin>`

### Alternative Solutions

_No response_

### Priority

Medium - Would be very helpful

### Feature Category

CLI commands and flags

### Use Case Example

_No response_

##### Supported Providers

- [Claude Code Integration](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code)
- [OpenAI Codex Integration](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/openai-codex)
- [OpenCode Integration](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/opencode)
- [Factory Droid Integration](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/factory-droid)

On this page

- [Overview](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code#overview)
- [Installation](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code#installation)
- [Capabilities](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code#capabilities)
- [Command-Line Arguments](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code#command-line-arguments)
- [Resume Mode](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code#resume-mode)
- [Plan Mode (Read-Only)](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code#plan-mode-read-only)
- [Session Storage](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code#session-storage)
- [Output Format](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code#output-format)
- [Slash Commands](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code#slash-commands)
- [Error Patterns](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code#error-patterns)
- [Usage with Maestro Features](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code#usage-with-maestro-features)
- [Context Window](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code#context-window)
- [Best Practices](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code#best-practices)
- [Troubleshooting](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code#troubleshooting)
- [Related Resources](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code#related-resources)

Claude Code is Anthropic’s flagship AI coding assistant, fully integrated with Maestro for powerful collaborative development.

## [​](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code\#overview)  Overview

Claude Code (`claude`) provides intelligent code generation, debugging, and refactoring capabilities with deep codebase understanding.

Claude Code is the most feature-complete agent in Maestro, supporting session resume, plan mode, image input, and comprehensive usage statistics.

## [​](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code\#installation)  Installation

1

[Navigate to header](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code#)

Install Claude Code

Install via npm:

```
npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code
```

2

[Navigate to header](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code#)

Authenticate

Run Claude Code once to authenticate:

```
claude
```

Follow the prompts to sign in with your Anthropic account.

3

[Navigate to header](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code#)

Verify in Maestro

Launch Maestro and create a new session with **Claude Code** as the agent type.

## [​](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code\#capabilities)  Capabilities

Claude Code provides the most comprehensive feature set of any Maestro-supported agent:

[​](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code#param-supports-resume)

supportsResume

boolean

default:"true"

Resume existing sessions with `--resume` flag

[​](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code#param-supports-read-only-mode)

supportsReadOnlyMode

boolean

default:"true"

Plan mode with `--permission-mode plan` (read-only access)

[​](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code#param-supports-json-output)

supportsJsonOutput

boolean

default:"true"

Structured JSON output with `--output-format stream-json`

[​](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code#param-supports-session-id)

supportsSessionId

boolean

default:"true"

Persistent session IDs for conversation continuity

[​](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code#param-supports-image-input)

supportsImageInput

boolean

default:"true"

Attach screenshots, diagrams, and images

[​](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code#param-supports-image-input-on-resume)

supportsImageInputOnResume

boolean

default:"true"

Send images via `--input-format stream-json` on resumed sessions

[​](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code#param-supports-slash-commands)

supportsSlashCommands

boolean

default:"true"

Built-in commands like `/help`, `/compact`, `/reset`

[​](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code#param-supports-session-storage)

supportsSessionStorage

boolean

default:"true"

Session history stored in `~/.claude/projects/`

[​](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code#param-supports-cost-tracking)

supportsCostTracking

boolean

default:"true"

Real-time cost information in USD

[​](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code#param-supports-usage-stats)

supportsUsageStats

boolean

default:"true"

Token counts for input and output

[​](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code#param-supports-thinking-display)

supportsThinkingDisplay

boolean

default:"true"

Streaming reasoning/thinking content

[​](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code#param-supports-context-merge)

supportsContextMerge

boolean

default:"true"

Receive merged context from other sessions

[​](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code#param-supports-context-export)

supportsContextExport

boolean

default:"true"

Export conversation context for transfer

Source: `src/main/agents/capabilities.ts:121`

## [​](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code\#command-line-arguments)  Command-Line Arguments

Maestro uses these base arguments for all Claude Code sessions:

```
claude --print --verbose --output-format stream-json --dangerously-skip-permissions
```

[​](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code#param-print)

--print

flag

Run in batch/headless mode (no interactive TUI)

[​](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code#param-verbose)

--verbose

flag

Enable detailed logging output

[​](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code#param-output-format)

--output-format

string

default:"stream-json"

Output format for structured parsing

[​](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code#param-dangerously-skip-permissions)

--dangerously-skip-permissions

flag

Auto-approve all file operations (required by Maestro)

### [​](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code\#resume-mode)  Resume Mode

To resume an existing session:

```
claude --resume {sessionId} [additional args]
```

[​](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code#param-resume)

--resume

string

Claude session ID to resume

### [​](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code\#plan-mode-read-only)  Plan Mode (Read-Only)

For read-only analysis without file modifications:

```
claude --permission-mode plan [additional args]
```

[​](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code#param-permission-mode)

--permission-mode

string

default:"plan"

Set to `plan` for read-only mode

Source: `src/main/agents/definitions.ts:125`

## [​](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code\#session-storage)  Session Storage

Claude Code stores session history in:

```
~/.claude/projects/{project-name}/{session-id}/
```

Each session directory contains:

- `conversation.json` \- Full conversation history
- `metadata.json` \- Session metadata and configuration
- `files/` \- Created/modified files during the session

Maestro can import existing Claude sessions for seamless continuation.Source: `src/main/storage/claude-code-session-storage.ts`

## [​](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code\#output-format)  Output Format

Claude Code outputs newline-delimited JSON events:

Init Event

Thinking Event

Tool Use

Result

Usage Stats

```
{
  "type": "system",
  "subtype": "init",
  "session_id": "abc123",
  "slash_commands": ["/help", "/compact", "/reset"]
}
```

Source: `src/main/parsers/claude-code-parser.ts`

## [​](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code\#slash-commands)  Slash Commands

Claude Code supports these built-in commands:

/help

Display available slash commands and usage information

/compact

Switch to compact output mode (less verbose)

/reset

Clear conversation history and start fresh

/context

Show current context window usage

## [​](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code\#error-patterns)  Error Patterns

Common error patterns Maestro detects:

[​](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code#param-api-key-invalid)

API\_KEY\_INVALID

error

**Pattern**: `Invalid API key`**Solution**: Re-authenticate with `claude` command

[​](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code#param-rate-limit-exceeded)

RATE\_LIMIT\_EXCEEDED

error

**Pattern**: `rate limit exceeded`**Solution**: Wait before retrying or upgrade your Anthropic plan

[​](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code#param-context-length-exceeded)

CONTEXT\_LENGTH\_EXCEEDED

error

**Pattern**: `context length exceeded`**Solution**: Start a new session or use `/reset` to clear context

[​](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code#param-permission-denied)

PERMISSION\_DENIED

error

**Pattern**: `permission denied`**Solution**: Check file permissions in working directory

Source: `src/main/parsers/error-patterns.ts`

## [​](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code\#usage-with-maestro-features)  Usage with Maestro Features

## Auto Run

Fully supported - Claude Code works with playbooks and automated workflows

## Group Chat

Participate in multi-agent group chats with other providers

## Context Grooming

Export and merge conversation context between sessions

## Session Discovery

Import existing Claude sessions from `~/.claude/projects/`

## [​](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code\#context-window)  Context Window

Claude Code uses Claude 3.5 Sonnet or Claude 4 models with:

- **Context Window**: 200,000 tokens
- **Output Limit**: ~8,000 tokens per response

Source: `src/renderer/utils/contextUsage.ts:15`

## [​](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code\#best-practices)  Best Practices

1

[Navigate to header](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code#)

Use Descriptive Session Names

Name sessions based on the task for easier identification in history

2

[Navigate to header](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code#)

Resume Instead of Restart

Use session resume to maintain context and reduce token usage

3

[Navigate to header](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code#)

Enable Plan Mode for Analysis

Use read-only mode when you only need code analysis without modifications

4

[Navigate to header](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code#)

Monitor Token Usage

Check the usage dashboard to track costs and optimize prompts

## [​](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code\#troubleshooting)  Troubleshooting

Claude Code not detected

Verify installation:

```
which claude
claude --version
```

If not found, reinstall:

```
npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code
```

Authentication failed

Re-authenticate:

```
claude logout
claude
```

Session resume fails

Check session exists:

```
ls ~/.claude/projects/
```

Session IDs are case-sensitive and must match exactly.

## [​](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/api/claude-code\#related-resources)  Related Resources

- [Claude Code Documentation](https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code)
- [Agent Management](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/core/agent-management)
- [Session Discovery](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/core/session-discovery)
- [Auto Run Playbooks](https://www.mintlify.com/RunMaestro/Maestro/power/auto-run-playbooks)

Sign up

[Sign in](https://medium.com/m/signin?operation=login&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fmedium.com%2F%40richardhightower%2Fwhen-claude-codes-browser-plugin-wasn-t-enough-a-journey-to-reliable-browser-automation-with-bd572b2e6e81&source=post_page---top_nav_layout_nav-----------------------global_nav------------------)

![](https://miro.medium.com/v2/resize:fill:64:64/1*dmbNkD5D-u45r44go_cf0g.png)

Press enter or click to view image in full size

Member-only story

# When Claude Code’s Browser Plugin Wasn’t Enough: A Journey to Reliable Browser Automation with Brave Profiles

## How CDP, AppleScript window fingerprinting, and agent-browser solve overnight browser automation for multi-profile consultants — WebLog (blog) of my trials and tribulations

[![Rick Hightower](https://miro.medium.com/v2/resize:fill:64:64/1*ayG9RqKzsG7gJLI0PEzHfg.jpeg)](https://medium.com/@richardhightower?source=post_page---byline--bd572b2e6e81---------------------------------------)

[Rick Hightower](https://medium.com/@richardhightower?source=post_page---byline--bd572b2e6e81---------------------------------------)

17 min read

·

Mar 13, 2026

--

Share

Claude Code’s browser plugin works great for interactive sessions, but falls apart for overnight cron jobs: wrong browser instance, session drops, no profile awareness. This article walks through the journey of building reliable browser automation using CDP, AppleScript window fingerprinting, and Vercel’s agent-browser to solve multi-profile browser control for scheduled tasks. This is my journey to get browser automation cron jobs to run at 4 AM, 5 AM, etc. in the middle of night.

> Your overnight cron job fires at 3am. The browser extension is dead. The wrong profile is frontmost. And Claude Code has no idea which client’s dashboard it is looking at.

I use different Brave browser profiles for the different companies I work with. As a consultant, this is non-negotiable. Each profile is a window into a distinct workflow: one for my personal accounts (Medium, LinkedIn, GitHub), one for NovaTech (Teams, Outlook, Jira), one for GreenField Labs (Harvest timecards, their internal tools), and one for my own company SpillWave (X, product repos). I never want a tab from one client’s intranet surfacing in another client’s browser session. Profiles keep credentials, cookies, and browsing history completely isolated.

> Brave and Chrome are both Chromium based browsers. I prefer Brave but the same techniques are compatible with Chrome, just as the Claude Plugin for Chrome works for the Brave browser.

This setup worked perfectly until I tried to use Claude Code’s `/loop` and `/schedule` features for overnight automation (from the Claude Code desktop app).

## The Problem: Cron Jobs at 3am Need a Reliable Browser

The `/loop` command in Claude Code is genuinely transformative. You can tell Claude to check a deployment every five minutes, babysit a PR, or scan error logs on a recurring schedule. I wrote…

[![Rick Hightower](https://miro.medium.com/v2/resize:fill:96:96/1*ayG9RqKzsG7gJLI0PEzHfg.jpeg)](https://medium.com/@richardhightower?source=post_page---post_author_info--bd572b2e6e81---------------------------------------)

[![Rick Hightower](https://miro.medium.com/v2/resize:fill:128:128/1*ayG9RqKzsG7gJLI0PEzHfg.jpeg)](https://medium.com/@richardhightower?source=post_page---post_author_info--bd572b2e6e81---------------------------------------)

[**Written by Rick Hightower**](https://medium.com/@richardhightower?source=post_page---post_author_info--bd572b2e6e81---------------------------------------)

[2.3K followers](https://medium.com/@richardhightower/followers?source=post_page---post_author_info--bd572b2e6e81---------------------------------------)

· [75 following](https://medium.com/@richardhightower/following?source=post_page---post_author_info--bd572b2e6e81---------------------------------------)

2026 Agent Reliability Playbook – Free Download DM me 'PLAYBOOK' for the full version + personalized 15-minute audit of your current agent setup (no pitch).

## No responses yet
